heading: Additional amounts for personnel and equipment for House Majority and Minority Leaders and Majority and Minority Whips

L. 104–186, title II, § 204(16)110 Stat. 1732July 14, 1983Aug. 20, 1996“The funds provided under the provisions of section 2 of House Resolution 393, Ninety-fifth Congress, agreed to , as enacted into permanent law by section 115 of the Congressional Operations Appropriation Act, 1978 [], and section 473 of the Legislative Reorganization Act of 1970 [], shall be limited to use for the compensation of additional personnel and other necessary official expenses.”March 31, 19772 U.S.C. 51422 U.S.C. 5103
